nasb.text: The Lord will make the pestilence cling to you until He has consumed you from the land where you are entering to possess it.

esv.text: The Lord will make the pestilence stick to you until he has consumed you off the land that you are entering to take possession of it.

cnv.text: 耶和華必使瘟疫隨著你，直到他把你從你進去得為業的地上滅絕了。

ccb.text: “祂要使瘟疫紧紧跟随你们，直到你们在将要占领的土地上被灭绝。
